# Copilot Instructions

Before analysis or code changes in this repository:

- Read `CLAUDE.md` at the repository root first.
- Treat `CLAUDE.md` as the canonical project-specific AI guide.
- After reading it, inspect only the relevant bounded context unless the work is clearly cross-cutting.
- Prefer extending existing foundations over introducing parallel systems.

Do not restate detailed project rules here. `CLAUDE.md` remains the single maintained source of truth.
